　　“去他娘的鬼方案，去他娘的要讲奉献，去他娘的朝九晚五九九六。大爷我还不伺候了！”
　　现代打工人林聪，穿越到潜龙大陆，成为修仙宗门青阳宗杂役。
　　激活二十四年一次的签到系统，获“三元星辰诀”功法，修为突飞猛进。获得分身一个，却是女人。
　　系统是我祖宗，使唤我。
　　分身是我祖宗，使唤我。
　　宗主是我媳妇，使唤我。
　　公主与我有婚约。
　　……
　　白天是宗门小杂役，晚上是世上大神仙。
　　扮猪吃虎的大佬感觉，真爽。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oaf84c5b0a41ab8b1d33dd5e6c956fca5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"月枫林","author_id":"","book_id":"7380229692055374910","book_name":"穿越成宗门杂役，扮猪吃虎","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7380229808849945150","read_count":"428","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"181364"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"70","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无敌,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oaf84c5b0a41ab8b1d33dd5e6c956fca5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779306268&x-signature=iEz2JZSPegyDwHKGKCZ3nrcF7b4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2312984410730269","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"13"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322034428A7B701E58BD27FD07956"}"},"relate_info_list":[
